title: Recording as Note
html:
Stub. Recording-as-note — Yahir's recurring sub-pattern of saving an audio recording (typically an m4a phone-call recording) as the entire body of an Apple Note, with no transcript, no notes-text, often just the call recipient's name as the title.

Why it's worth tracking

The audio is the deliverable; no transcript means the artifact is unsearchable by brain ask until manually transcribed. Surfacing the pattern here lets densify catch the cluster as a coherent class.

Sources (chronological)

  • 2018 11 21 voice memo 1339 — earliest preserved instance (ambient-noise transcription)
  • 2019 03 27 voice memo 2158 — late-evening singing fragment
  • 2019 04 01 prediction — 21-second after-school micro-rant
  • 2019 09 25 voice memo 1455 — 11-second school frustration capture
  • 2020 01 23 casey — 7-second pattern-noticing micro-omen
  • 2020 02 06 voice memo 1509 — overheard exchange micro-clip
  • 2020 03 14 voice memo 1927 — Oregon-shutdown-day twin-bed fragment
  • 2021 10 12 voice memo 1000 — partly-noisy alcoholism reflection
  • 2024 09 07 voice memo 0208 — 2 AM Shanghai music-only clip
  • 2025 03 12 call recording
  • 2025 09 29 call recording
  • 2025 11 27 call with ethan hemstead
  • 2026 01 24 call with bapi
  • 2026 04 16 call with emily stevens

Related

  • — parent recurring-form
  • two party consent states — privacy/legal context for unannounced recording
